allow: PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Path "D:\\BGA_Inspection_Claude" -Depth 2 | Where-Object { $_.PSIsContainer -eq $false -or $_.PSIsContainer -eq $true } | Select-Object FullName, PSIsContainer | Format-Table -AutoSize)

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "D:\\BGA_Inspection_Claude" -File | Where-Object { $_.Extension -in '.py', '.md', '.txt', '.cfg', '.ini', '.yaml', '.json' } | Select-Object Name, LastWriteTime | Sort-Object LastWriteTime -Descending)
